summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Performance Review page (/review/v-seed-1). All 11 features tested and working correctly: page title, video player, timeline markers, filter tabs, feedback cards, coach info card, suggested drills, drill modal, review submission, toast notification, and back navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Video player with custom timeline and colored markers working correctly
Filter tabs correctly filter feedback items by type (coach/ai/highlight)
DrillVideoModal reused from Video Analysis page with YouTube embed
Review submission with star rating, topics, and textarea working
Toast notification using react-hot-toast at bottom-right
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data inline in PerformanceReview.js and youtubeDrills.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Review page fully tested. Key test IDs: review-title, review-breadcrumb, review-video-player, review-play-btn, review-timeline, review-playpause, review-filter-tabs, filter-coach, filter-ai, filter-highlight, timeline-feedback-section, feedback-tf1 through feedback-tf5, coach-info-card, suggested-drills-section, suggested-drill-yt_001/yt_047/yt_009, start-drill-yt_001, drill-video-modal, drill-video-iframe, drill-modal-close, review-coach-section, star-1 through star-5, topic-Footwork etc, review-textarea, submit-review-btn, back-to-sessions.

features_tested.page_title: PASS - 'Performance Review — Arjun Mehta' displayed correctly
features_tested.breadcrumb: PASS - 'My Sessions › Video Review › Performance Review' navigation
features_tested.video_player_with_thumbnail: PASS - Video player container with poster image
features_tested.play_button: PASS - Orange play button overlay visible when paused
features_tested.timeline_legend: PASS - Coach/AI/Highlight legend with colored dots
features_tested.feedback_cards_clickable: PASS - Cards have cursor-pointer and onClick handler
features_tested.feedback_card_coach_pick_badge: PASS - Orange 'Coach Pick' badge on tf1, tf3
features_tested.feedback_card_ai_icon: PASS - Sparkle icon on AI type feedback (tf2)
features_tested.feedback_card_tags: PASS - Footwork, Smash, Defense, Positioning, Net Play tags
features_tested.coach_info_card: PASS - AM initials, Arjun Mehta, Footwork & Smash, 4.8 rating
features_tested.drill_cards: PASS - yt_001, yt_047, yt_009 cards displayed
features_tested.start_drill_button: PASS - Orange '+ Start Drill' button on each card
features_tested.drill_modal_opens: PASS - DrillVideoModal opens on Start Drill click
features_tested.drill_modal_title: PASS - Drill title displayed in modal
features_tested.review_coach_section: PASS - Section with star rating, topics, textarea
features_tested.star_rating: PASS - 5 clickable stars with hover effect
features_tested.topic_selection: PASS - 8 topic buttons (Footwork, Technique, Defense, etc.)
features_tested.submit_review_button: PASS - Disabled when rating=0, enabled after rating
features_tested.submit_shows_toast: PASS - 'Review submitted! Thank you for your feedback.' toast
features_tested.submit_shows_thank_you: PASS - 'Thanks for your feedback!' message replaces form
